audit_items.proof_trace: The no-solution branch (solution.length == 0) at L78 calls OZ SafeERC20.forceApprove with exactly getAssetOutAmount(...), which sets the allowance to that precise value regardless of any prior residual — for standard ERC20s it overwrites directly; for USDT-style tokens it does 0→value. Every no-solution bid call resets the allowance to exactly the required amount, so no residual from prior bids accumulates at bidding time.
